description: Initializes induction machine fetching routine ‘NXTIND’ for returning induction machines attached to IBUS. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = iniind(ibus)

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘NXTIND’ may not be used.
Bus has no induction machines connected to it; ‘NXTIND’ may not be used.
